name: Certified cell capacity
description: Cells and certified capacity for every prison with an active certification requirement and a current cell certificate, taken from the approved cell certificate (the certified snapshot of accommodation). Supports the Capacity Management team.

dataset.name: Cell certificate list
dataset.description: One row per certified location (wings, landings, spurs and cells) for every prison with an active certification requirement and a current cell certificate. Figures are already rolled up in the certificate. Only the top-level locations link to the certificate directly (cell_certificate_id); descendants are gathered by walking parent_location_id down up to 6 levels.
dataset.query:
WITH roots AS (
    SELECT l.id AS loc_id, c.prison_id, c.signed_operation_capacity
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate c
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_prison_configuration pc ON pc.prison_id = c.prison_id
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.cell_certificate_id = c.id
    WHERE c.current = true AND pc.certification_approval_required = true
),
n2 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN roots r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n3 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n2 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n4 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n3 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n5 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n4 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n6 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n5 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
ids AS (
    SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM roots
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n2
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n3
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n4
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n5
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n6
)
SELECT
    ids.prison_id,
    p.name AS prison_name,
    p.name || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(l.path_hierarchy, '-', 1), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(l.path_hierarchy, '-', 2), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(l.path_hierarchy, '-', 3), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(l.path_hierarchy, '-', 4), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(l.path_hierarchy, '-', 5), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(l.path_hierarchy, '-', 6), 6, '0') AS sort_key,
    l.location_code,
    l.path_hierarchy,
    INITCAP(l.local_name) AS local_name,
    l.cell_mark,
    l.level,
    INITCAP(REPLACE(l.location_type, '_', ' ')) AS location_type,
    (CASE WHEN l.location_type = 'CELL' THEN (CASE WHEN l.in_cell_sanitation THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) END) AS sanitation,
    l.certified_normal_accommodation AS cna,
    l.working_capacity,
    l.max_capacity,
    ids.signed_operation_capacity,
    INITCAP(REPLACE(REPLACE(l.accommodation_types, '_', ' '), ',', ', ')) AS accommodation_type,
    INITCAP(REPLACE(REPLACE(l.specialist_cell_types, '_', ' '), ',', ', ')) AS cell_type,
    INITCAP(REPLACE(REPLACE(l.used_for_types, '_', ' '), ',', ', ')) AS used_for
FROM ids
JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.id = ids.loc_id
JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = ids.prison_id
WHERE p.active = true
ORDER BY p.name, l.path_hierarchy

dataset.name: Prisons
dataset.query: SELECT DISTINCT c.prison_id, p.name AS prison_name FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate c JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_prison_configuration pc ON pc.prison_id = c.prison_id JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = c.prison_id WHERE c.current = true AND pc.certification_approval_required = true AND p.active = true ORDER BY p.name

dataset.name: Establishment totals
dataset.query:
SELECT prison_name,
       COUNT(*) AS cell_count,
       SUM(cna) AS cna,
       SUM(working_capacity) AS working_capacity,
       SUM(max_capacity) AS max_capacity
FROM ${tableId}
WHERE location_type = 'Cell'
GROUP BY prison_name

dataset.name: Grand totals
dataset.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cell_count,
       SUM(cna) AS cna,
       SUM(working_capacity) AS working_capacity,
       SUM(max_capacity) AS max_capacity
FROM ${tableId}
WHERE location_type = 'Cell'

dataset.name: Certified capacity totals by establishment
dataset.query:
WITH roots AS (
    SELECT l.id AS loc_id, c.prison_id, c.signed_operation_capacity
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate c
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_prison_configuration pc ON pc.prison_id = c.prison_id
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.cell_certificate_id = c.id
    WHERE c.current = true AND pc.certification_approval_required = true
),
n2 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN roots r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n3 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n2 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n4 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n3 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n5 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n4 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n6 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id, r.signed_operation_capacity FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n5 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
ids AS (
    SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM roots
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n2
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n3
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n4
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n5
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id, signed_operation_capacity FROM n6
)
SELECT
    ids.prison_id,
    p.name AS prison_name,
    COUNT(*) AS number_of_cells,
    SUM(l.certified_normal_accommodation) AS cna,
    SUM(l.working_capacity) AS working_capacity,
    SUM(l.max_capacity) AS max_capacity,
    MAX(ids.signed_operation_capacity) AS signed_operational_capacity,
    SUM(CASE WHEN l.max_capacity = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS single_cells,
    SUM(CASE WHEN l.max_capacity = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS double_cells,
    SUM(CASE WHEN l.in_cell_sanitation THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cells_with_sanitation,
    SUM(CASE WHEN NOT l.in_cell_sanitation OR l.in_cell_sanitation IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cells_without_sanitation
FROM ids
JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.id = ids.loc_id
JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = ids.prison_id
WHERE p.active = true AND l.location_type = 'CELL'
GROUP BY ids.prison_id, p.name

dataset.name: Cells by accommodation type
dataset.query:
WITH roots AS (
    SELECT l.id AS loc_id, c.prison_id
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate c
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_prison_configuration pc ON pc.prison_id = c.prison_id
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.cell_certificate_id = c.id
    WHERE c.current = true AND pc.certification_approval_required = true
),
n2 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN roots r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n3 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n2 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n4 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n3 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n5 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n4 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n6 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n5 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
ids AS (
    SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM roots
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n2
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n3
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n4
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n5
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n6
),
base AS (
    SELECT ids.prison_id, p.name AS prison_name, split_to_array(l.accommodation_types, ',') AS arr
    FROM ids
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.id = ids.loc_id
    JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = ids.prison_id
    WHERE p.active = true AND l.location_type = 'CELL' AND l.accommodation_types IS NOT NULL AND l.accommodation_types <> ''
)
SELECT b.prison_id, b.prison_name,
       INITCAP(REPLACE(TRIM(CAST(a AS VARCHAR)), '_', ' ')) AS accommodation_type,
       COUNT(*) AS cell_count
FROM base b, b.arr AS a
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3

dataset.name: Cells by used for
dataset.query:
WITH roots AS (
    SELECT l.id AS loc_id, c.prison_id
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate c
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_prison_configuration pc ON pc.prison_id = c.prison_id
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.cell_certificate_id = c.id
    WHERE c.current = true AND pc.certification_approval_required = true
),
n2 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN roots r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n3 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n2 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n4 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n3 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n5 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n4 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n6 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n5 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
ids AS (
    SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM roots
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n2
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n3
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n4
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n5
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n6
),
base AS (
    SELECT ids.prison_id, p.name AS prison_name, split_to_array(l.used_for_types, ',') AS arr
    FROM ids
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.id = ids.loc_id
    JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = ids.prison_id
    WHERE p.active = true AND l.location_type = 'CELL' AND l.used_for_types IS NOT NULL AND l.used_for_types <> ''
)
SELECT b.prison_id, b.prison_name,
       INITCAP(REPLACE(TRIM(CAST(a AS VARCHAR)), '_', ' ')) AS used_for,
       COUNT(*) AS cell_count
FROM base b, b.arr AS a
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3

dataset.name: Cells by cell type
dataset.query:
WITH roots AS (
    SELECT l.id AS loc_id, c.prison_id
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate c
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_prison_configuration pc ON pc.prison_id = c.prison_id
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.cell_certificate_id = c.id
    WHERE c.current = true AND pc.certification_approval_required = true
),
n2 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN roots r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n3 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n2 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n4 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n3 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n5 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n4 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n6 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n5 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
ids AS (
    SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM roots
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n2
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n3
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n4
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n5
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n6
),
base AS (
    SELECT ids.prison_id, p.name AS prison_name, split_to_array(l.specialist_cell_types, ',') AS arr
    FROM ids
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.id = ids.loc_id
    JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = ids.prison_id
    WHERE p.active = true AND l.location_type = 'CELL' AND l.specialist_cell_types IS NOT NULL AND l.specialist_cell_types <> ''
)
SELECT b.prison_id, b.prison_name,
       INITCAP(REPLACE(TRIM(CAST(a AS VARCHAR)), '_', ' ')) AS cell_type,
       COUNT(*) AS cell_count
FROM base b, b.arr AS a
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3

dataset.name: Working capacity variance
dataset.description: One row per cell, in prisons with an active certification requirement and a current cell certificate, where the working capacity held on the approved cell certificate differs from the working capacity the cell is actually operating at today. A cell that is temporarily deactivated - or that sits under a temporarily deactivated wing, landing or spur - operates at a working capacity of zero while the certificate continues to hold its certified figure, so temporary changes show up here as a variance. Cells present live but absent from the certificate, and cells on the certificate that no longer exist, are also listed. Archived (permanently deactivated) cells are excluded because archiving zeroes capacity and removes certification.
dataset.query:
WITH cfg AS (
    SELECT p.prison_id, p.name AS prison_name
    FROM prisons.prisonregister_prison p
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_prison_configuration pc ON pc.prison_id = p.prison_id
    WHERE p.active = true AND pc.certification_approval_required = true
),
roots AS (
    SELECT l.id AS loc_id, c.prison_id
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate c
    JOIN cfg ON cfg.prison_id = c.prison_id
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.cell_certificate_id = c.id
    WHERE c.current = true
),
n2 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN roots r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n3 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n2 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n4 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n3 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n5 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n4 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
n6 AS (SELECT l.id AS loc_id, r.prison_id FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l JOIN n5 r ON l.parent_location_id = r.loc_id),
cert_ids AS (
    SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM roots
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n2
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n3
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n4
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n5
    UNION ALL SELECT loc_id, prison_id FROM n6
),
cert AS (
    SELECT ci.prison_id,
           l.path_hierarchy,
           l.location_code,
           l.local_name,
           l.cell_mark,
           l.certified_normal_accommodation,
           l.working_capacity,
           l.max_capacity
    FROM cert_ids ci
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_cell_certificate_location l ON l.id = ci.loc_id
    WHERE l.location_type = 'CELL' AND l.converted_cell_type IS NULL
),
inactive_ancestors AS (
    SELECT c.id AS loc_id
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_location c
    JOIN cfg ON cfg.prison_id = c.prison_id
    JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_location a
      ON a.prison_id = c.prison_id
     AND c.path_hierarchy LIKE a.path_hierarchy || '-%'
     AND a.status <> 'ACTIVE'
    WHERE c.location_type_discriminator = 'CELL'
    GROUP BY c.id
),
live AS (
    SELECT l.id,
           l.prison_id,
           l.path_hierarchy,
           l.code AS location_code,
           l.local_name,
           l.cell_mark,
           l.status,
           l.deactivated_reason,
           CAST(l.deactivated_date AS DATE) AS deactivated_date,
           l.proposed_reactivation_date,
           l.temporarily_off_cell_cert,
           cap.certified_normal_accommodation AS cna,
           cap.max_capacity,
           (CASE WHEN l.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ia.loc_id IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END) AS operationally_active,
           (CASE WHEN l.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ia.loc_id IS NULL THEN COALESCE(cap.working_capacity, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS actual_working_capacity
    FROM prisons.locationsinsideprison_location l
    JOIN cfg ON cfg.prison_id = l.prison_id
    LEFT JOIN prisons.locationsinsideprison_capacity cap ON cap.id = l.capacity_id
    LEFT JOIN inactive_ancestors ia ON ia.loc_id = l.id
    WHERE l.location_type_discriminator = 'CELL' AND l.converted_cell_type IS NULL
),
cmp AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(lv.prison_id, ct.prison_id) AS prison_id,
        COALESCE(lv.path_hierarchy, ct.path_hierarchy) AS path_hierarchy,
        ct.path_hierarchy AS cert_path_hierarchy,
        lv.id,
        COALESCE(lv.location_code, ct.location_code) AS location_code,
        COALESCE(lv.local_name, ct.local_name) AS local_name,
        COALESCE(lv.cell_mark, ct.cell_mark) AS cell_mark,
        lv.status,
        lv.deactivated_reason,
        lv.deactivated_date,
        lv.proposed_reactivation_date,
        lv.temporarily_off_cell_cert,
        lv.operationally_active,
        lv.cna,
        lv.max_capacity,
        lv.actual_working_capacity,
        ct.certified_normal_accommodation AS certified_cna,
        ct.working_capacity AS certified_working_capacity,
        ct.max_capacity AS certified_max_capacity
    FROM live lv
    FULL OUTER JOIN cert ct ON ct.prison_id = lv.prison_id AND ct.path_hierarchy = lv.path_hierarchy
)
SELECT
    cmp.prison_id,
    cfg.prison_name,
    cfg.prison_name || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(cmp.path_hierarchy, '-', 1), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(cmp.path_hierarchy, '-', 2), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(cmp.path_hierarchy, '-', 3), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(cmp.path_hierarchy, '-', 4), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(cmp.path_hierarchy, '-', 5), 6, '0') || '-' || LPAD(SPLIT_PART(cmp.path_hierarchy, '-', 6), 6, '0') AS sort_key,
    cmp.id,
    cmp.path_hierarchy,
    COALESCE(CASE WHEN cmp.id IS NULL THEN '' ELSE cmp.path_hierarchy END, '') AS cell_link_text,
    'Current cell certificate' AS certificate_link_text,
    cmp.location_code,
    INITCAP(cmp.local_name) AS local_name,
    cmp.cell_mark,
    cmp.certified_working_capacity,
    COALESCE(cmp.actual_working_capacity, 0) AS actual_working_capacity,
    COALESCE(cmp.actual_working_capacity, 0) - COALESCE(cmp.certified_working_capacity, 0) AS variance,
    (CASE
        WHEN cmp.cert_path_hierarchy IS NULL THEN 'Not on certificate'
        WHEN cmp.id IS NULL THEN 'Cell no longer exists'
        WHEN cmp.operationally_active = FALSE THEN 'Temporarily deactivated'
        WHEN COALESCE(cmp.actual_working_capacity, 0) < COALESCE(cmp.certified_working_capacity, 0) THEN 'Working capacity reduced'
        ELSE 'Working capacity increased'
    END) AS variance_type,
    INITCAP(cmp.status) AS status,
    (CASE WHEN cmp.temporarily_off_cell_cert THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END) AS temporarily_off_cell_cert,
    INITCAP(REPLACE(cmp.deactivated_reason, '_', ' ')) AS deactivated_reason,
    cmp.deactivated_date,
    cmp.proposed_reactivation_date,
    cmp.certified_cna,
    cmp.cna,
    cmp.certified_max_capacity,
    cmp.max_capacity
FROM cmp
JOIN cfg ON cfg.prison_id = cmp.prison_id
WHERE COALESCE(cmp.status, '') <> 'ARCHIVED'
  AND COALESCE(cmp.actual_working_capacity, 0) <> COALESCE(cmp.certified_working_capacity, 0)
ORDER BY cfg.prison_name, cmp.path_hierarchy

report.name: Certified cells by establishment
report.description: Lists every certified location (wings, landings, spurs and cells) for each prison with an active certification requirement and a current cell certificate, grouped by establishment, with per-establishment and overall totals. All figures are taken from the approved cell certificate.

report.name: Certified cells list (for download)
report.description: A flat list of every certified location (wings, landings, spurs and cells) for each prison with an active certification requirement and a current cell certificate, ordered by establishment then location. No sections or totals - intended for downloading to Excel, where the Type column can be used to filter to cells only. All figures are taken from the approved cell certificate.

report.name: Working capacity variance (certificate v actual)
report.description: Every cell in a prison with an active certification requirement where the working capacity on the approved cell certificate differs from the working capacity the cell is actually operating at, ordered by establishment then location. A temporarily deactivated cell - or a cell under a temporarily deactivated wing, landing or spur - counts as a working capacity of zero, so temporary changes appear here as a variance. Also lists cells that are not on the certificate and certificate entries whose cell no longer exists. Archived cells are excluded. Each row links to the cell in Locations Inside Prison and to the prison's current cell certificate.

dashboard.name: Certified capacity summary by establishment
dashboard.description: Certified capacity totals from the current cell certificate for each establishment.

dashboard.name: Cells by accommodation type
dashboard.description: Number of certified cells for each accommodation type.

dashboard.name: Cells by used for
dashboard.description: Number of certified cells for each 'used for' type. Cells with multiple used-for types are counted once per type.

dashboard.name: Cells by cell type
dashboard.description: Number of certified cells for each specialist cell type. Cells with multiple cell types are counted once per type.
